public.student_schedule_view.definition: select "enrollments"."id", "enrollments"."student_id", "enrollments"."school_year_id", "enrollments"."term_id", "class_schedules"."section_id", "class_schedules"."subject_id", "class_schedules"."teacher_id", "class_schedules"."time_in", "class_schedules"."time_out", "class_schedules"."room", "schedule_days"."day" from "enrollments" inner join "class_schedules" on "class_schedules"."section_id" = "enrollments"."section_id" inner join "schedule_days" on "schedule_days"."schedule_id" = "class_schedules"."id"
public.student_schedule_view.name: student_schedule_view
